title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud Run is a serverless platform that simplifies deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. New capabilities enable scaling and efficient execution while reducing operational overhead for next-generation AI-driven applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers recent additions to Cloud Run, the serverless platform for deploying AI agents and inference workloads. The focus is on new capabilities for scaling and efficient execution, with the goal of cutting operational overhead for AI-driven applications. The takeaway: Cloud Run is positioned to handle next-generation inference and agent deployments without managing underlying infrastructure.
